sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Direxion每日二倍做多人工智慧與大數據ETF-AIBU-ETF淨值表格
feed.summary: This article provides the net asset value (NAV) table for the Direxion Daily AI and Big Data Bull 2X ETF (NYSE:AIBU). It includes current market price and NAV, along with a detailed list of daily NAVs and market prices for the past 30 days. The page also offers disclaimers regarding performance calculations and investment risks associated with the ETF.

feed.title: When your first-class ‘flight’ turns out to be a bus ride
feed.summary: Passengers booking flights, sometimes even first-class, are increasingly finding themselves on buses instead, a practice utilized by airlines to connect smaller airports to larger hubs. American Airlines, for example, has been using The Landline Company for such bus "flights" since 2022. This shift can lead to unexpected travel experiences for passengers who complete all typical airport procedures only to board a bus.

feed.title: SRPT: Citigroup Raises Price Target Amid Maintained 'Sell' Ratin
feed.summary: Citigroup has maintained its 'Sell' rating on Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT) while significantly increasing its price target from USD 9.00 to USD 13.00, a 44.44% boost. This adjustment reflects changing market conditions and expectations for SRPT, despite other analysts having "Outperform" or "Overweight" ratings with higher price targets. The average target price from 25 analysts is $30.24, implying a potential upside of 37.95% from the current price, with a "Hold" consensus from 26 brokerage firms.

feed.title: Gartner (NYSE:IT) Price Target Cut to $166.00 by Analysts at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group analysts have reduced their price target for Gartner (NYSE:IT) from $180.00 to $166.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 7.62% from the current stock price. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets for Gartner, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $189.30 for the information technology services provider.

feed.title: Is Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) one of the best conservative stocks to buy right now?
feed.summary: This article evaluates Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) as a potential conservative stock investment. It aims to determine if TMO's financial performance and market position make it an attractive option for investors seeking stability.

feed.title: Systane Eye Drops: Alcon's Leading Solution for Dry Eye Relief in North America
feed.summary: Systane eye drops, produced by Alcon, offer fast and long-lasting relief for dry and irritated eyes, a common issue in North America exacerbated by screen time and environmental factors. The product utilizes a unique gel-forming technology for extended hydration and is a significant part of Alcon's consumer health portfolio. Its strong market position and brand loyalty contribute to Alcon's stable revenue and shareholder value, appealing to investors in the resilient eye care sector.

feed.title: Sarepta Therapeutics Is Maintained at Sell by Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has reiterated its "Sell" rating for Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT). This maintenance of a negative outlook indicates the firm's continued skepticism regarding the company, despite potential market developments. The analyst's current stance suggests that challenges or fundamental concerns may persist for Sarepta.

feed.title: T-Mobile to Host Q1 2026 Earnings Call on April 28, 2026
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) announced that it will host its first quarter 2026 financial and operational results call on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The earnings release and related materials will be available at approximately 4:05 p.m. ET on the same day on the company's Investor Relations website. The call will be accessible via webcast and dial-in with pre-registration.

feed.title: Choosing the Best Artificial Intelligence ETF: Roundhill's CHAT Compared to State Street's XLK
feed.summary: This article compares two prominent technology ETFs: State Street's XLK and Roundhill's CHAT, focusing on their suitability for AI investment. While CHAT offers a more concentrated, actively managed approach to generative AI with higher potential returns and volatility, XLK provides broader exposure to the tech sector with a lower expense ratio and more stability. The choice depends on an investor's risk tolerance and whether they seek pure AI exposure or a diversified tech investment.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises PT on NRG Energy (NRG) Stock
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley raised its price target for NRG Energy (NRG) to $157 from $153, maintaining an "Equal Weight" rating, citing updates to its coverage of Regulated & Diversified Utilities / IPPs in North America. Separately, Wolfe Research upgraded NRG Energy to "Outperform" with a $190 target, believing asset acquisitions support its return to a traditional power generator with upside sensitivity to supply and demand tightening. The article also notes the utilities sector's February outperformance and growing optimism for load growth and data center deals.

feed.title: NextEra Energy (NEE): President Trump Approves Development of up to 10 Gigawatts of Natural Gas‑powered Generation
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) announced that President Trump approved the development of up to 10 gigawatts of natural gas-powered generation in Texas and Pennsylvania. This initiative is part of a trade deal between the US and Japan, involving Japan's $550 billion investment in the US. The projects will be co-owned by Japan and the U.S. and operated by NextEra Energy, with finalization subject to further negotiations and definitive agreements.

feed.title: Want to buy Wells Fargo or maybe TJX? Here are the levels to watch
feed.summary: Jim Cramer's Investing Club identified Wells Fargo (WFC) as a strong buy following the lifting of its asset cap, suggesting investors consider buying if shares fall below $80. TJX Companies (TJX) was also highlighted as a favored stock during economic uncertainty due to its off-price model, with potential buying opportunities during market dips. Cramer also cautioned investors against making big stock moves while oil prices significantly influence the market.

feed.title: Xylem stock trades lower as World Water Day tweet spotlights innovation push
feed.summary: Xylem (XYL) stock is trading lower despite the company's World Water Day campaign highlighting innovation and partnerships for a new era of water solutions. Technical indicators show sustained selling pressure, with the stock below key moving averages and momentum signals confirming bearish trends. While a slight weekly recovery was noted, the forecast suggests a low probability of further price increases and a higher likelihood of a renewed decline, with a projected trading range of $121.40 to $122.70 for the next week.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: NXPI) Parent Reports 0 Shares After Jan 12 Realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G (13G/A) for NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NXPI), reporting zero beneficial ownership of common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report their beneficial ownership separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The parent company states it no longer has beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated entities, making this a compliance-driven amendment rather than a change in economic ownership.

feed.title: Prudential layoffs in Newark reach 237
feed.summary: Prudential Financial Inc. has announced another round of layoffs at its Newark headquarters, bringing the total job cuts to 237 since July as part of an ongoing organizational restructuring. The latest WARN notice affects 54 positions to be eliminated between May and June. Despite these reductions, the company reported improved financial performance with a net income of $905 million for the fourth quarter.

feed.title: eBay Launches 'The NYC Edit,' Revealing What New York's Most 'In-the-Know' Tastemakers Are Selling and Buying
feed.summary: eBay has launched "The NYC Edit," an editorial guide featuring 10 New York tastemakers who are sharing what they are buying and selling on the platform. This initiative, available at ebay.com/nycedit, highlights vintage and in-demand fashion and home items, and includes an in-person market in April. The campaign aims to reinforce eBay's focus on fashion and recommerce, building on its 135 million active users and over $10 billion in fashion Gross Merchandise Volume in 2025.

feed.title: Sempra employees volunteer at Feeding San Diego as Sempra stock consolidates near recent highs
feed.summary: Sempra employees recently volunteered at Feeding San Diego, packing over 7,700 pounds of produce as part of the company's community engagement efforts. Meanwhile, Sempra's (SRE) stock price has risen 3.94% to $95.35 this week, nearing its 52-week high, with strong bullish momentum across major timeframes. Technical analysis suggests the stock is likely to consolidate in the $96.40–$97.70 range, with potential for further upside if resistance at $97.70 is broken.

feed.title: inMorphis Named as ServiceNow Partner of the Year 2026 - Risk & Security - Asia Pacific
feed.summary: inMorphis has been recognized with the 2026 ServiceNow Partner of the Year Award for Risk & Security in the Asia Pacific region. This award acknowledges inMorphis's significant contributions to strengthening cybersecurity, risk management, and compliance for its clients using ServiceNow's platform. inMorphis, an Elite and ServiceNow-invested partner, specializes in modernizing GRC and IT Security operations through the ServiceNow AI platform, delivering measurable business outcomes.

feed.title: Grainger Stock Is Up 7% Year to Date. Here’s Why Steady Growth and Strong Margins Could Drive More Upside in 2026
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger's stock is up 7% year-to-date, trading near $1,076 per share, driven by strong revenue growth, robust margins, and resilient demand in its distribution business. The company's digital platforms, Zoro and MonotaRO, are contributing significantly to its growth and margin expansion, allowing it to compete effectively in the industrial distribution market. A valuation model suggests a target price of $1,359, implying a 26% upside due to sustained revenue growth, elevated operating margins, and continued expansion of its Endless Assortment segment.

feed.title: AECOM selected to continue advancing San Diego Unified School District’s capital bond programs
feed.summary: AECOM has been chosen by the San Diego Unified School District (SDUSD) to continue as a prime consultant, providing supplemental support services for the District's capital bond programs. This selection extends their decades-long partnership, focusing on delivering future-ready learning environments, including new classrooms, safety upgrades, and sustainability improvements. AECOM's team, along with 12 local and small business partners, will work to modernize existing schools and create high-quality learning environments across San Diego.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Stock: Strong Value Metrics and Positive Analyst Outlook Position Shares for Long-Term Growth
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group is highlighted as a top value stock in the cruise sector, distinguished by attractive valuation metrics, upward earnings revisions for 2026, and positive analyst outlooks suggesting significant upside for North American investors. The company's diversified brands, resilient operations, and strategic market positioning contribute to its investment merit within the recovering travel sector. Despite potential risks like rising fuel costs and debt maturities, the overall risk-reward profile is considered constructive for long-term holders.

feed.title: Welltower (NYSE:WELL) Price Target Raised to $228.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has increased its price target for Welltower (NYSE:WELL) from $218.00 to $228.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 15.67% upside. This follows Welltower's recent outperformance in quarterly revenue and EPS estimates. Other analysts have also raised their price targets, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $225.43.

feed.title: Colgate’s $300 Million Productivity Push Targets a 47% Total Return
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) posted strong operating cash flow in FY2025 despite an impairment charge on its skin health unit, with its Hill’s Pet Nutrition division showing solid growth. The company's new 2030 strategy, backed by a $200-$300 million productivity program, aims for 3-5% long-term organic sales growth using AI-driven tools. Analysts view CL stock constructively, anticipating a 47% total return over 4.8 years based on valuation models and expected EPS growth.

feed.title: GE HealthCare announces lead industrial role in largest EU-funded IHI consortium to advance cardio-oncology care across Europe
feed.summary: GE HealthCare will lead the industrial efforts in the new COMPASS consortium, a five-year, €50.5 million initiative funded by the EU's Innovative Health Initiative (IHI). This large public-private partnership aims to improve cardio-oncology care across Europe by advancing early detection and prediction of cardiotoxicity in cancer patients and survivors. Utilizing AI, advanced imaging, biomarkers, and integrated care pathways, COMPASS seeks to address cardiovascular complications, which are the second leading cause of death in cancer survivors.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Is Up 33% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has seen a 33% increase in its stock price year-to-date, trading near $43 per share, due to early signs of stabilization in the residential solar market. Despite some mixed sentiment from recent revenue figures and insider share sales, institutional investors are increasing their stakes, suggesting a potential recovery. A valuation model projects a target price of $50 for Enphase Energy, indicating a modest undervaluation and potential 16% upside over the next 2.8 years, driven by demand recovery, margin rebuilding, and growth in energy storage adoption.

feed.title: Prologis Inc. Stock: Leading Logistics REIT Faces Real Estate Sector Headwinds Amid AI-Driven Opportunities
feed.summary: Prologis Inc., the world's largest logistics REIT, is navigating real estate sector headwinds and interest rate pressures, yet analysts maintain a bullish outlook due to the company's strong relationships with hyperscalers and focus on AI data center opportunities. The company demonstrated operational resilience by matching EPS expectations and exceeding revenue forecasts in its latest quarter, providing confident guidance for FY2026. North American investors are advised to monitor earnings guidance execution and hyperscaler demand for insights into future performance.

feed.title: Central Pa. college maintains strong S&P Global ratings
feed.summary: York College has announced that S&P Global Ratings has affirmed its A- long-term rating on revenue bonds issued for the college, alongside a stable outlook. This rating reflects the institution's solid financial position, demonstrated by consistent operating surpluses and three consecutive years of enrollment growth. The college's Chief Finance Officer highlighted significant growth in cash and investments, reinforcing their commitment to sustainable financial management and continued investment in students and the community.

feed.title: CSG Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Journey Analytics & Orchestration
feed.summary: CSG (NASDAQ: CSGS) has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Journey Analytics & Orchestration due to its platform, CSG Xponent. The platform helps businesses manage and improve customer interactions by turning real-time data into actionable insights, leading to enhanced customer experiences and business outcomes. For instance, a U.S. bank using CSG Xponent decreased inbound calls by 12% and achieved a $30 million financial impact.

feed.title: Huntington water main replacement brings traffic limits through June
feed.summary: West Virginia American Water has announced an $815,000 infrastructure upgrade project on South Walnut Street in Huntington, involving the replacement of 1,600 feet of aging pipe with 6-inch PVC main. This project, which is part of a larger $129 million statewide investment plan for 2026, is scheduled for completion by the end of June 2026, with final street restoration by fall 2026. The work will involve temporary traffic restrictions and potential service interruptions for customers during weekday work hours.

feed.title: West Virginia American Water Invests $815,000 in Huntington Infrastructure
feed.summary: West Virginia American Water is investing $815,000 in an infrastructure upgrade project on South Walnut Street in Huntington. This project involves replacing 1,600 feet of aging pipe with new 6-inch PVC main and is part of the company's larger plan to invest over $129 million in infrastructure across the state in 2026. The investment aims to strengthen the water system, improve reliability for customers, and support local economic health by generating jobs.

feed.title: ACCESS Newswire Inc.: ACCESS Newswire Upgrades the ACCESS Platform to Include Social Monitoring to Track Brand Conversations Across Major Social Platforms
feed.summary: ACCESS Newswire has upgraded its ACCESS platform to include Social Monitoring, allowing organizations to track brand conversations across major social media platforms like Facebook, LinkedIn, X, and TikTok. This new feature integrates real-time brand monitoring, sentiment analysis, and influencer tracking within a single dashboard, enhancing the company's PR and IR solutions. The upgrade is expected to drive annual recurring revenue growth by increasing customer value and adoption of subscription services, with a target ARR of $14,000 to $15,000 per customer by the end of 2026.

feed.title: Why Is Wave Life Sciences Stock Falling After Weight Loss Study Data?
feed.summary: Wave Life Sciences (NASDAQ:WVE) shares dropped sharply after the announcement of interim Phase 1 data from its INLIGHT trial for WVE-007, despite positive six-month data showing significant reductions in visceral fat and stability in lean mass. The stock is experiencing significant bearish pressure, trading well below its moving averages, even though analysts have recently raised price targets with "Buy" ratings.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 0 shares of Everest Group (NYSE: EG) in 13G/A
feed.summary: Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A reporting 0 shares and 0% ownership of Everest Group Ltd Common Stock. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing clarifies that Vanguard itself no longer beneficially owns the securities held by these disaggregated subsidiaries.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock joins Ryder Cup worldwide partner roster through 2031
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock, a sustainable packaging manufacturer, has partnered with the Ryder Cup as a global sponsor through 2031. The partnership will cover the next three editions of the golf tournament in 2027, 2029, and 2031, providing Smurfit Westrock with branding presence and contributing to the event's sustainability efforts. The company's expertise in recyclable packaging will be crucial for the Ryder Cup's environmental goals.

feed.title: Has The Recent Share Price Slide Created An Opportunity In Zscaler (ZS)?
feed.summary: Zscaler (ZS) has experienced a significant share price decline, including a 10.6% drop over the last 7 days and a 34.1% decline over the past year. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 39.6%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $230.87 per share compared to its current trading price of $139.44. Additionally, its Price/Sales ratio of 7.47x is below its "Fair Ratio" of 8.24x, further indicating it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Track brand chatter in one dashboard: ACCESS adds social monitoring
feed.summary: ACCESS Newswire (NYSE: ACCS) has launched ACCESS Social Monitoring, a new subscription add-on that integrates real-time social listening, sentiment analysis, influencer tracking, and historical trends directly into its platform. This feature, which was made generally available in March 2026 after a pilot with 100 universities, aims to help organizations monitor brand conversations across major social media platforms. The company expects this addition to drive growth in annual recurring revenue (ARR), guiding towards an average subscription ARR of $14,000-$15,000 per customer by the end of 2026.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is issuing Uncapped Digital Barrier Notes linked to the lesser performing of the S&P 500 Index and the Russell 2000 Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for investors seeking uncapped, unleveraged exposure to the appreciation of the underlying indices at maturity, with a contingent minimum return of at least 53.25%. Investors face risks including potential loss of principal if the indices fall below a barrier amount, and credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Stryker Restores Most Manufacturing After Hack Damaged Networks
feed.summary: Stryker Corp., a medical technology company, has restored most of its manufacturing and electronic ordering system after experiencing a cyberattack earlier this month. The company stated that its manufacturing capabilities are quickly ramping up, with most critical sites and production lines back online.

feed.title: Andersons (ANDE) director sells 15,000 common shares
feed.summary: Andersons, Inc. director Patrick E. Bowe reported selling a total of 15,000 shares of common stock in open-market transactions on March 24 and March 25, 2026. After these sales, Bowe directly holds 144,874.6324 shares of Andersons common stock. The transactions were disclosed in a Form 4 filing with the SEC.

feed.title: Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock Dips Modestly as Investors Eye AI Spending and Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Alphabet (GOOGL) shares dipped modestly as investors considered its significant AI investments following strong Q4 2025 results. The company reported robust revenue and net income, driven by Google Services and Google Cloud, but projected high capital expenditure for 2026 to fund AI infrastructure. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating, anticipating continued growth despite potential near-term margin pressures from AI spending.

feed.title: NUE: UBS Upgrades Nucor with Price Target Raised to $190 | NUE S
feed.summary: UBS analyst Andrew Jones has upgraded Nucor (NUE) from a Neutral rating to a Buy, simultaneously increasing the price target from $184.00 to $190.00. This upgrade comes as Nucor, a major steel and steel products manufacturer, has received an average brokerage recommendation of "Outperform" from 18 firms, with an average target price of $175.96. GuruFocus also estimates a fair value of $172.30 for NUE.

feed.title: UBS Downgrades Mosaic (MOS), Lowers Price Target to $27 | MOS St
feed.summary: UBS has downgraded Mosaic (MOS) from 'Buy' to 'Neutral' and lowered its price target to $27 from $33, representing an 18.18% decrease. This follows several other analyst adjustments, with the average one-year price target for MOS now at $31.34, suggesting a 23.23% upside from its current price. GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $30.13, indicating an 18.46% upside.

feed.title: Philip Morris International stock consolidates as VP Scientific Engagement explains nicotine levels in smoke-free alternatives
feed.summary: Philip Morris International stock is consolidating around $165.66 amidst a generally bearish technical outlook, despite a recent modest rebound. The company's VP Scientific Engagement, Gizelle Baker, discussed the importance of understanding nicotine levels in smoke-free alternatives, with an interview now available for viewing. Technical indicators suggest continued sideways movement within a defined range, with a low probability of an upside reversal this week.

feed.title: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE: LYB
feed.summary: The ongoing conflict in the Strait of Hormuz is significantly impacting the S&P 500's performance, with 15 of the top 20 best-performing stocks in March directly benefiting from the crisis. The oil and gas industry accounts for 12 of these, driven by rising crude prices. Additionally, three chemical companies are thriving due to soaring fertilizer input costs and disrupted petrochemical supply chains caused by the Hormuz disruption.

feed.title: Allstate Corp. Stock: A Cornerstone of Property-Casualty Insurance Stability for North American Inve
feed.summary: Allstate Corp. (ISIN: US0200021014) is highlighted as a leading U.S. property-casualty insurer offering North American investors reliable dividends and essential insurance market exposure. The article explores its robust business model, competitive strengths in a digitizing market, and financial stability through consistent dividend payments. It also discusses strategic initiatives for growth and identifies key risks such as catastrophe losses and regulatory scrutiny, emphasizing the company's adaptability for sustained performance.

feed.title: Market Chatter: Bank of Montreal Targets 15% Return On Equity On Wealth, U.S. Business Growth
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) is reportedly targeting a 15% return on equity, driven by growth in its wealth management and U.S. business segments. This news item also briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, where the company exceeded revenue expectations but reported a loss.

feed.title: Alamo Group (ALG) director grooms buys $39985 in shares
feed.summary: Alamo Group (ALG) director Nina C Grooms recently purchased 233 shares of common stock for $39,985, increasing her total direct ownership to 3077 shares. This insider transaction comes amidst mixed sentiments from analysts following the company's Q4 2025 financial results, which fell short of expectations. While DA Davidson maintained a Neutral rating, William Blair initiated coverage with an Outperform rating, highlighting the stock's undervaluation compared to its peers.

feed.title: Amesite Executes Trading Partner Agreement Enabling Secure Connectivity with Leading Homecare Technology Platform
feed.summary: Amesite Inc. (Nasdaq: AMST) has signed an Electronic Transactions Trading Partner Agreement with a major homecare technology platform, enabling secure, HIPAA-compliant exchange of electronic visit verification (EVV) transactions. This integration allows Amesite's AI-native NurseMagic™ platform to seamlessly connect and streamline EVV processes, offering a critical advancement in non-acute care. The agreement positions NurseMagic™ to leverage existing compliance infrastructures while transforming care workflows with AI, supporting homecare providers nationwide.

feed.title: Amesite Inc. (stock code: AMST) has signed a partnership agreement aimed at establishing a secure connection with a leading home care technology platform.
feed.summary: Amesite Inc. (AMST) has signed a partnership agreement to establish a secure connection with a prominent home care technology platform, enhancing its network of technological partnerships. This collaboration focuses on integration and data security to ensure seamless connectivity and leverage Amesite's AI-driven solutions to support the home care sector. The agreement is expected to strengthen Amesite's competitive position by improving service efficiency and reliability.

feed.title: Veeco Instruments stock hits 52-week high at 35.78 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Veeco Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ: VECO) stock reached a new 52-week high of $35.78, reflecting a 58% increase over the past year and underscoring investor confidence. While the stock trades at a P/E ratio of 59.82 and is considered overvalued by InvestingPro, analysts forecast continued profitability with an EPS of $1.75 for fiscal 2026. The company recently reported mixed Q4 2025 results with revenue of $165 million meeting guidance, but diluted EPS of $0.24 falling short of forecasts, leading Needham to maintain a Hold rating.
